items.title: Getarent
items.description: A car-sharing marketplace with booking, payments, and fleet management. Led architecture decisions and built features across web and mobile platforms.

items.title: Developer Portal
items.description: A full-featured developer portal with WIKI, CMS, smart search with suggestions, and an AI-powered intelligent assistant.

items.title: OSAGO Widget
items.description: An embeddable insurance widget for the Wildberries marketplace. Built as a standalone Vue 3 component with complex form validation and third-party API integrations.

items.title: Mozen Mobile App
items.description: A cross-platform mobile application built from scratch with offline-first architecture, Firebase integration, and native Android features via Kotlin.

items.title: This Portfolio
items.description: Personal portfolio site with glassmorphism design, magnetic skill bubbles, dark mode, i18n, and a content-driven blog.
